en: A: How is the weather today?

ab: pakahtuw a wagi’ la, makilux cubalay.
en: The sun is coming out, it's very hot.
A: Is it going to be cold outside?
B: It's cold, so wear more clothes.
A: Will it be hot outside?
B: No, it's windy and cool.
A: How is the weather today?

ab: ini’ kagihaaq, ini’ uwiy uw kakilux sawni’, balayq cubalay a kisleq.
ch: B:今天不冷也不熱，很舒服。
en: B: It's neither cold nor hot today, very comfortable.
A: How is the weather tonight?

ab: ukas a hamhum i babaw na kaal, pakahtuw a buliquw la.
ch: B:天空沒有雲，星星出來了。
en: B: There were no clouds in the sky; the stars came out.
A: How is the weather outside?

ab: yani na’ masuwat ku quwalax, matuwagi’ ru’ pakahtuw a hakri’ na utux la.
ch: B:雨剛剛停，出了太陽，彩虹出來了。
en: B: The rain has just stopped, the sun has come out, the rainbow is coming out.

ab: humicuwa’ ku kaal tagi ki cimu kiya?
en: A: How is the weather there?

ab: sabayhuw cu mamati’ tagi ki cami i runi.
en: B: We're going to have a big storm here.

ab: balayq a kaal tagi ki isu’ quw?
en: A: How's the weather there?
B: Very well, out of the big sun.
A: I have to go to school.

ab: tala’tu’ a kaal, kapayux masiyatu’ cu siyatu’.
en: B: The weather is very cold, so wear more clothes.
A: I'm going out for a walk.

ab: pakrahuwal a quwalax i kisa’, laxi ungi’ maras cu hawsuwa.
ch: B:等一下會下大雨，你要記得帶傘。
en: B: It's going to rain heavily, you have to remember to bring an umbrella.
A: Is it going to rain?

ab: yani na’ mabicu sawni’, paquwalax cubalay kisa’.
ch: B:剛剛打雷了，等一下應該就會下雨。
en: B: There was thunder just now, and it's supposed to rain later.
A: Is it raining?

ch: B:剛剛有下雨，現在雨停了。
en: B: It just rained, and now it's stopped.
A: Is it raining?

ab: asiga quminuwalax la, mahuweq a raneq.
ch: B:好像下過雨了，馬路是濕的。
en: B: It seems to have rained and the road is wet.

ab: quminuwalax quw? micuwa’ su’ ka asika huwehuweq?
ch: A:有下雨嗎?你怎麼全身都濕了?
en: A: Is it raining? Why are you all wet?

ab: qumuwalax tagi latanux, ini’ kuwing aras cu hawsuwa.
ch: B:外面在下雨，我沒有帶雨傘。
en: B: It's raining outside, so I didn't bring an umbrella.
A: Are you all right?

ab: rahuwal ku bayhuw umiyup, muxaal a tunux mu.
en: B: The wind is blowing so hard that my head hurts.
A: Are you all right?

ab: mamati’ a wagi’, maimag siptukakayran mu na tunux.
ch: B:太陽好大，曬得我頭好暈。
en: B: The sun is so big, it makes me dizzy.
